revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image: a pixel-art terrain tile sheet for a top-down Japanese fantasy RPG.

STRICT OUTPUT GEOMETRY:
- Final image must be exactly 64x64 pixels.
- 4 columns x 4 rows, 16 frames total.
- Each frame is exactly 16x16 pixels.
- No visible grid lines, borders, tile IDs, labels, text, UI, watermark, or characters.
- Every frame must stay inside its own 16x16 cell and keep the same scale.
- Opaque image. Use solid #FF00FF magenta only for any truly empty unused space, but the sheet should be fully filled by terrain tiles so there should be no empty space.

ASSET:
- SNES-era 16-bit crisp low-resolution pixel art terrain-tile sheet.
- Profile: snes16_platformer_v1.
- Preset: world_grass_variation_16, adapted to sacred Shinto shrine plateau ground.
- Top-down view only; no isometric perspective, no vanishing point.
- Seamless on all four edges for every individual 16x16 tile.
- All frames are center-fill shrine ground surface variations, no edge transitions.

MOOD AND MATERIAL:
- Sacred interior of a Shinto shrine plateau, calm, maintained, clean, sacred.
- Not wild field grass, not village lawn, not close-up flowers.
- Short clipped grass with very subtle stone paving hints between grass clumps.
- Small flat stepping stones barely visible, fine gravel patches, tiny moss cushions.
- Low visual noise, broad low-frequency variation, cohesive palette, no high-frequency checkerboard texture, no repeated square stamp.
- Soft dappled light from bamboo canopy above, warm morning dew glistening subtly on grass tips, golden-hour warmth.
- Top-left light source; use one-pixel dark outline only where useful around stones or moss clusters.

COLOR PALETTE:
- Muted sage green #8ab87a as main grass.
- Soft stone grey #c8c4b2 for subtle flat stones.
- Pale gold highlight #e8e0c0 for dew and warm highlights.
- Cool moss shadow #4a6a3a for moss shadows and darker grass.
- Bright cheerful but restrained sacred grove palette.

FRAME CONTENT MAP:
- Frames 0-7 (top two rows): pure clipped grass variations only, minor variation in grass blade angle, density, broad color drift, sparse dew highlights, no large flowers.
- Frames 8-11 (third row): clipped grass with one or two small flat stepping stones visible, stones embedded naturally and subtle.
- Frames 12-15 (bottom row): clipped grass with slightly more fine gravel and tiny moss cushion texture, still calm and low-noise.

STYLE QUALITY:
- Crisp readable pixel clusters, no antialiasing blur, no painterly blur.
- Consistent scale and identity across all 16 frames.
- Make each tile seamless and tilemap-friendly so the final game view does not read as a visible checkerboard.
- Avoid hard rectangular bands; vary texture, edge breakup, and lighting within each tile while keeping all edges seamless.

NEGATIVE CONSTRAINTS:
- No large flowers, no rice paddy elements, no mud, no water, no road, no hard transition edges.
- No characters, animals, birds, companion creatures, monsters, facility icons, buildings, torii, weapons, armor, samurai armor, kabuto helmet, ninja outfit, two-sword daisho, guns, modern objects, horror mood, dark gloomy palette.
- No Mario/Nintendo/Zelda/Final Fantasy/Pokemon/Dragon Quest/Secret of Mana/Okami/Sakuna characters, logos, likenesses, letter emblems, modern text, watermark, or UI.
